name: concord
description: A bundle of Claude Code harness-engineering tools. Currently: a per-session state checkpoint, a cross-session task charter (a project's guiding goal plus the decisions made along the way), and a review-and-fix loop that keeps reviewing a code change, fixing what it finds, and re-checking until the tests actually pass -- or hands back the parts a person has to decide. State is persisted from the transcript and re-injected on resume, compaction, or a fresh session. Grows with more harness capabilities.
